description: Twenty-four hours after a patient's appointment, the system automatically sends them a satisfaction survey.

nodes.task_description: A system process identifies all completed appointments from the previous day.

expected_outcome.value: The system generates a list of patients to survey.

nodes.task_description: For each patient, the system sends a link to a satisfaction survey via email or text.

expected_outcome.value: The survey is successfully delivered to the patients.

nodes.task_description: The patient's responses are collected and aggregated into a performance dashboard.

expected_outcome.value: The practice is able to collect feedback to improve the patient experience.
